title: North Eastern Hill University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: North Eastern Hill University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: North Eastern Hill University Result 2026 declared for PG 3rd Semester Zoology and Statistics (Regular 2024 Batch) December 2025 examinations on the official website - nehu.ac.in on 26/03/2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the North Eastern Hill University result.

content.text: North Eastern Hill University has released the NEHU Result 2026 for PG 3rd Semester Zoology and Statistics Regular 2024 Batch examinations held in December 2025. NEHU Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - nehu.ac.in. Students can download the official result PDFs and check their marks and result status for the third semester PG courses. Candidates need to verify their roll number, name and subject wise marks carefully and contact the university or their department if any discrepancy is noticed in the published result.

sections.heading: North Eastern Hill University Results 2026 Key Highlights

content.text: NEHU has uploaded course wise PDFs for Zoology and Statistics 3rd Semester Regular 2024 batch examinations under the December 2025 session. These results are hosted on the PG result portal, making it easy for postgraduate students to access their performance details.

sections.heading: North Eastern Hill University Result 2026 Direct Link

content.text: NEHU has provided direct PDF links for the 3rd Semester Regular 2024 Batch Zoology and Statistics results along with listing them on the PG result portal. Students can use the following links to open the respective result documents.

links.label: Result of Zoology 3rd Semester Regular 24 Batch, December 2025
Result of Statistics 3rd Semester (Regular 2024 Batch), December 2025

content.text: Follow these steps to check and download your NEHU PG 3rd Semester Result 2026:

items: Visit the NEHU PG result portal http://exams.nehu.ac.in/PGresults.
Look for the links titled: Result of Zoology 3rd Semester Regular 24 Batch, December 2025 Result of Statistics 3rd Semester (Regular 2024 Batch), December 2025
Result of Zoology 3rd Semester Regular 24 Batch, December 2025
Result of Statistics 3rd Semester (Regular 2024 Batch), December 2025
Click on the View Result link for your course to open the PDF.
Once the PDF opens, press Ctrl+F and type your roll number or name to quickly locate your entry.
Check your subject wise marks, total marks and overall result status (Pass/Fail/Back, if mentioned).
Download and save the PDF or take a printout for future academic use and documentation.

structured_links.label: Result of Zoology 3rd Semester Regular 24 Batch, December 2025
Result of Statistics 3rd Semester (Regular 2024 Batch), December 2025
